description: Event Rooms, Run Modifiers, and CombatEngine Integration. Create EventRoomManager with 4 event rooms, RunModifiers for Danjin's Curse and permanent modifiers, and fully integrate all new systems into CombatEngine (status ticks, telegraph handling, multi-target, stun checks, cooldown ticking, event rooms, run modifiers, skill choice state, equip screen).
steps: Create src/controller/RunModifiers.java extending GameEventDispatcher: Tracks Danjin's Curse (every 5 waves at wave 5, 10, 15, 20 reduce player maxHp by 5 permanently). Tracks permanent modifiers from event rooms (stored as a list of applied modifiers). Method applyWaveModifiers(int wave, Player player) - called at wave start, applies curse if wave is divisible by 5, fires CURSE_APPLIED event. Method applyPermanentDamagePerTurn(Player player, int damage) for 'Danjin's Heart absorption' modifier. Has getter for active modifiers. Fires RUN_MODIFIER_APPLIED events.

Create src/controller/EventRoomManager.java extending GameEventDispatcher: Triggers after waves 3, 7, 13, 17. Method shouldTrigger(int wave) returns true for those waves. Method getEventRoom(int wave) returns event room data. Method applyChoice(int wave, int choiceIndex, Player player, RunModifiers modifiers) applies the chosen effect. Fires EVENT_ROOM_ENTERED and EVENT_ROOM_CHOICE_MADE events.

Implement event room content: After Wave 3 'The Dying Knight': Choice A = random RARE item from ItemRegistry, Choice B = random EPIC weapon + apply CURSE (-5 max HP via RunModifiers). After Wave 7 'Cursed Fountain': Choice A = heal 50 HP + reduce maxMana by 10 permanently, Choice B = +15 ATK permanently, Choice C = nothing. After Wave 13 'The Merchant Ghost': Choice A = random LEGENDARY item (cost 50 HP via takeDamage), Choice B = trade weapon for random EPIC weapon, Choice C = nothing. After Wave 17 'Danjin's Heart': Choice A = +30 ATK +30 DEF + 10 damage per turn permanently, Choice B = full heal + full mana, Choice C = remove all CURSE effects + enemies lose 20% HP (store flag for WaveManager to apply).

Integrate all systems into CombatEngine.java: Add fields for RunModifiers, EventRoomManager, SkillTree reference. Register forwarding listeners on RunModifiers and EventRoomManager. In processPlayerAction(): (a) call player statusManager.tickAll() at turn start and handle effects (apply poison damage, regen heals), (b) check if player is stunned - if so skip turn and return to AWAITING_PLAYER_ACTION, (c) after action, tick skill cooldowns. In processEnemyTurn(): (a) call enemy statusManager.tickAll(), (b) check if enemy is stunned - skip if so, (c) handle telegraph state - if enemy isWindingUp execute ability instead of normal attack. In advanceWave(): (d) check RunModifiers.applyWaveModifiers(), (e) check EventRoomManager.shouldTrigger() and transition to EVENT_ROOM state if needed. Add processEventRoomChoice(int choice) method. Add processSkillChoice(int skillIndex) method for milestone wave selections. Add processEquipScreen() or similar for EQUIP_SCREEN state.

Support multi-target attacks in CombatEngine: Add a method processSkillAction(Skill skill) that handles MULTI_TARGET skills (like Chain Lightning) - iterates all currentEnemies and applies damage to each. Single-target skills work like existing actions.

Wire up startNextWave() to check for skill milestone waves (5, 10, 15) - after clearing wave 4, 9, 14, transition to SKILL_CHOICE state before the next wave starts. Offer 3 skill choices via SkillTree.
Handle permanent damage-per-turn from 'Danjin's Heart' choice A: In the player turn tick, if RunModifiers has that flag, deal 10 damage to player.
Handle 'Shatter Danjin's Heart' (wave 17 choice C): Store a flag that reduces all future enemy HP by 20% - modify WaveManager or CombatEngine to apply this after enemy creation.
Register forwarding listeners on player's Inventory and SkillTree so their events bubble up through CombatEngine.

Ensure full compilation with all packages: javac -d out -sourcepath src src/model/events/*.java src/model/status/*.java src/model/items/*.java src/model/skills/*.java src/model/enemies/*.java src/model/*.java src/controller/*.java
acceptance_criteria: Each event room has the correct number of choices with correct effects
CombatEngine ticks status effects at start of each turn for both player and enemies
CombatEngine checks stun before allowing actions
CombatEngine handles enemy telegraph (wind-up one turn, fire next)
CombatEngine transitions to EVENT_ROOM state after appropriate waves
CombatEngine transitions to SKILL_CHOICE state at milestone waves
Multi-target skills hit all enemies in current wave
Skill cooldowns tick at end of player turn
No I/O in model or controller
verification: Run: javac -d out -sourcepath src src/model/events/*.java src/model/status/*.java src/model/items/*.java src/model/skills/*.java src/model/enemies/*.java src/model/*.java src/controller/*.java - must exit 0
Run: grep -rn 'System\.' src/model/ src/controller/ | grep -v '// ' - no System.in/out/err
